params.description: 5×6 dot array displayed as reference. 5 rows of 6 dots. 30 dots total.
Four dot arrays displayed as answer options. A) 3×10 array. B) 6×5 array. C) 10×3 array. D) 2×15 array. All arrays show 30 dots total.

beats.text: Here's an array: 5 rows of 6. That's 30 dots. These four arrays all have 30 dots too. Which one is the same array, just rotated?
Which array is the same as 5 times 6, just rotated?

validator.description: Student selected B) 6 × 5, correct rotation of 5×6

params.description: Option B) 6 × 5 highlights to confirm selection.

beats.text: 6 rows of 5. That's 5 rows of 6, just turned. Same dots, same product.

elements.description: 5×6 dot array displayed as reference. 5 rows of 6 dots.
